data.title: The Cheesecake Factory Introduces New App With Exclusive Offer for Cheesecake Rewards Members
data.description: A restaurant chain, The Cheesecake Factory, famous for its diverse menu and signature desserts, has launched a new mobile application tailored for its patrons. As part of a promotion available from April 1 to April 30, all Cheesecake Rewards members can claim a complimentary slice of any of the restaurant's 30+ renowned cheesecake flavors by simply downloading the app and signing into their account. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CAKE, and is headquartered in Calabasas Hills, California.
Wealth Divide: Banks In China's Poorer Regions Bear Brunt Of Margin Squeeze

data.title: Home BancShares, Inc. Announces Completion of the Acquisition of Mountain Commerce Bancorp, Inc.
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB) finalized its acquisition of Mountain Commerce Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Mountain Commerce Bank. This transaction was carried out following the terms outlined in the definitive agreement and plan of merger. Through a series of mergers, Mountain Commerce was integrated into Home, and Mountain Commerce Bank was merged into Centennial Bank. As of today, this acquisition is now in effect, marking a significant development for both companies involved.

data.title: auxi AI Launches Darwin, a Purpose-Built AI Agent for Consulting Firms and Investment Banks
data.description: Boston-based company auxi has introduced Darwin, a conversational AI tool designed specifically for consultants and investment bankers. The tool is powered by artificial intelligence and aims to enhance productivity when working on PowerPoint presentations.

data.title: ERES Files Management Information Circular in Connection with the Special Meeting to Approve Acquisition by Canadian Apartment Properties Real Estate Investment Trust
data.description: Today, European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (ERES) disclosed the filing of its management information circular and associated materials for the upcoming special meeting of unit holders. The meeting, to be held to discuss the proposed Arrangement, involves Unitholders and non-participating special voting units holders. ERES, trading under TSX: ERE.UN, is preparing for this crucial gathering, emphasizing the importance of the proposed changes.

data.title: Arbiter Acquires Vertical Raise to Expand Fundraising Support for Schools and Communities
data.description: In Sandy, Utah on April 1, 2026, Arbiter revealed the acquisition of Vertical Raise, an esteemed fundraising company for schools across the country. Arbiter, known as the centralized platform for K-12 athletics and activities management, made this announcement. Vertical Raise is acclaimed for its innovative approach to fundraising and has a widespread presence in schools nationwide. This acquisition marks an important move in the industry, bringing together two prominent companies to enhance their offerings to schools and educators.

data.title: ADP National Employment Report: Private Sector Employment Increased by 62,000 Jobs in March; Annual Pay was Up 4.5%
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey, recent data shows a positive trend in the private sector job market as employment saw a boost of 62,000 positions in March. Additionally, wages showed a promising increase of 4.5% compared to the previous year. The findings were a part of the March ADP National Employment Report®, a collaborative effort between ADP Research and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab.

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. Announces Closing of Acquisition of Eaze Inc.
data.description: Vireo's recent acquisition has broadened its reach to 10 states, now boasting over 160 dispensaries and approximately 800,000 square feet dedicated to cultivation and production.

data.title: Subsea 7 - Awarded contract offshore Equatorial Guinea
data.description: Luxembourg - On April 1st, 2026, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed that they had secured a significant contract from Noble Energy EG Ltd, a Chevron Company. The contract entails the subsea installation aspects of the Aseng Gas Monetisation Project located off the coast of Equatorial Guinea. This project will include a single-well tieback linking the Aseng field to the established Alen platform. The contract signifies a major milestone for Subsea 7 S.A. and underscores their expertise in this field.
US ADP Employment Change Mar: 62K (est 40.0K; prev 63.0K)

data.title: Swipe Savvy Acquires GiftAMeal to Expand Purpose-Driven Engagement for Restaurants
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Orlando, Florida, Swipe Savvy, a platform focused on customer engagement and rewards, revealed its acquisition of GiftAMeal, a restaurant marketing platform. GiftAMeal converts guest photos into meals for nearby food banks. This move integrates both platforms seamlessly, offering a straightforward experience for guests.

data.title: Erthos Named One of TIME's Top GreenTech Companies of 2026, Validating Its Disruptive Approach to AI Energy Infrastructure
data.description: A company based in Tempe, Arizona called Erthos, Inc. has recently gained recognition from TIME as one of America's Top GreenTech Companies of 2026. Their high-density Earth Mount Solar™ platform is said to be transforming the solar landscape. Erthos, Inc. was ranked among the top 250 companies in this category.
Adeia Announces Patent Infringement Litigation Against DISH Network; Reiterates Full 2026 Outlook

data.title: NCCN 2026 Annual Conference Prepares Cancer Care Providers Worldwide for Healing the Whole Patient
data.description: During the annual event hosted by the National Comprehensive Cancer Network, important topics in oncology were addressed. This included a growing concern over the increasing number of cancer cases among younger individuals. The event also highlighted global opportunities to enhance outcomes in cancer treatment. The conference featured the latest research advancements and updates on clinical guidelines. This gathering served as a platform to discuss pressing issues in the field of oncology and provided valuable insights for healthcare professionals and researchers.

Israel MDA: 'Following the rocket fire towards the Kiryat Shmona area: At this stage, no reports of casualties have been received. MDA teams have been dispatched to scan the sites where reports were received. Update to follow if necessary.'
KING CHARLES WILL SPEAK TO THE U.S. CONGRESS ON APRIL 28, ACCORDING TO THE U.S. HOUSE SPEAKER'S ANNOUNCEMENT.

data.title: Summer Road Files Definitive Proxy Materials and Mails Letter to Ingles Markets Class A Shareholders Outlining Why They Need to Elect an Independent Director to Represent Their Interests
data.description: A company called Summer Road LLC, which owns around 3% of the Class A common stock of Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA), has submitted a definitive proxy statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for Ingles' 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for April 30, 2026. Summer Road aims to address concerns by sending a letter to Class A shareholders.

data.title: RLJ Lodging Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) is set to release its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, before the markets open on May 4, 2026. A conference call will follow at 11:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. To join the call, it is advised to dial in about 10 minutes prior. Participants can access the conference call by dialing (877) 407-3982, or for international callers, (201) 493-6780.

data.title: Emergency Dental of America Deploys Videa Voice Notes to Streamline Clinical Documentation Across Their Network
data.description: A prominent dental AI platform, VideaHealth, has revealed that Emergency Dental of America has implemented Videa in its 22 practices after a prosperous trial phase. This incorporation of Videa introduces ambient clinical documentation to a challenging dental care environment, addressing the issue of time constraints for note-taking between patients. Emergency Dental of America follows a rapid, high-volume care approach that necessitates streamlined clinical handovers for efficient operations.

data.title: Viamericas Opens New Operations and Service Hub in Tijuana to Support Long-Term Growth Strategy
data.description: Viamericas, a fintech company, has recently revealed the inauguration of a new operations and service center in Tijuana, Mexico.
